About Us

Built on relationships,
not appointments

MBS Medical was founded on a simple idea: healthcare works better when your provider actually knows you. One consistent provider, comprehensive records, and a care plan that evolves with your life.

Continuity of care

You see the same provider every time. They know your history, your medications, and your goals — not just what's in the chart.

Evolving care plans

Your care plan isn't static. It grows and adapts as your health changes, your goals shift, and new information comes in.

The Team

Who's behind your care

Founder & Primary Provider

David, PA-C

Physician Associate with 12 years of U.S. Army service. Licensed in Florida. Specializes in primary care, weight loss, and TRT evaluation.

Founded MBS Medical to provide direct, consistent access to a provider who knows each patient's full health picture — not just what's on a chart for today's visit.

PA-C, Licensed FL 12 Years U.S. Army Primary Care Weight Loss TRT Evaluation

Supervising Physician

Dr. Eric Folkens, MD

American Board of Family Medicine certified. 34+ years clinical practice in family medicine and primary care.

Supervising Physician

Dr. Mark Dawson, MD

30+ years clinical practice. Specialization in gastroenterology, metabolic health, and GI expertise. Provides oversight for cases involving GI health and complex comorbidities.

Ready to meet
your provider?

Book a visit and start building a care relationship that lasts.

Book a Visit

Telehealth medical care across Florida. Cash pay, no insurance. Same-week appointments.
